title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-1033
summary: 1 Petitioner, a native of Tunis, Africa, was ordered deported after a hearing pursuant to § 242(b) of the Immigration and Nationality Act of 1952, 66 Stat. It was found that he had been convicted in 1938 of violation of the Marihuana Tax Act, 26 U.S.C.
